name: jstack-audit
description: Top-level JStack command for evidence-bound read-only repository audits.

interface.longDescription: Top-level Codex workflow for bounded repository audits across correctness, security, architecture, maintainability, performance, supply chain, tests, compatibility, data integrity, and operations. It keeps findings evidence-bound and never edits audited code.
defaultPrompt: Run a read-only evidence-bound JStack audit of this repository.
